title: gymnanthemum frutescens
intro: Gymnanthemum frutescens, also known as African Blue Basil or Lemon Balm, is a plant species native to Africa, characterized by its fragrant leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Gymnanthemum frutescens include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
